thesis: Hyperscaler capex guides keep rising into earnings season; supply of next-gen racks is booked through year end. Demand signal, not hype.
Streaming margin story is priced for perfection while parks attendance is softening. One weak quarter re-rates it.
Government AI contract flow is accelerating and the stock just reclaimed its 50-day. Momentum regime intact.
Crude curve is backwardated with OPEC discipline holding. Energy is the cheapest inflation hedge on the board.
Profitable four quarters running, deposit base compounding, still valued like a 2022 fintech casualty.
MI-series benchmarks leaking ahead of launch event look competitive on inference cost per token. Street models haven't caught up.
Margin compression from rack competition plus lingering accounting overhang. Crowded long unwinding.
Retail volumes at 12-month highs and every product launch is landing. The tape says accumulation.
Steepening yield curve into bank earnings is the cleanest setup in financials. Fortress balance sheet optionality.
Agentic AI narrative masks decelerating seat growth. Legacy SaaS multiple with a disrupted core.
Ad-tier ARPU inflecting and live sports slate lands this quarter. Subscriber-to-revenue story flipping.
Institutional custody flows rising with the regulatory calendar clearing. Beta to a market that wants to run.
Robotaxi timeline slipping again while auto gross margins grind lower. Story stock, deteriorating fundamentals.
Search revenue proving resilient to AI substitution fears; cloud reaccelerating. Cheapest of the megacaps on forward earnings.
Free cash flow machine trading at a discount to delivery peers. AV partnerships are upside, not existential risk.
Ad load on Reels still under-monetized versus feed; AI targeting gains compounding. Earnings beat setup.
GMV acceleration plus breakout above spring range on volume. Trend followers are just arriving.
AI feature cycle underwhelming and China units still bleeding. The safety-trade premium is unearned.
AWS reacceleration plus retail margin expansion is a two-engine story into earnings.
Sum-of-parts says parks alone cover the price. Sentiment washout is the entry.
Copilot seat expansion showing up in channel checks ahead of earnings. Azure AI revenue disclosure is the catalyst.
New highs on rising volume with breadth confirming. Don't fight the leader of the regime.
Fee compression from stablecoin rails is a structural threat the multiple ignores. Fade the euphoria.
Energy storage bookings inflecting; the battery business alone re-rates the stock if autos stabilize.
Launch event next week with hyperscaler design wins expected on stage. Buy the setup, not the rumor mill.
Priced for flawless execution at all-time highs into a seasonally weak content quarter. Risk/reward says fade.
Highest relative strength in software for six straight weeks. Winners keep winning until they don't — and this one is.
Geopolitical risk premium is being priced out of crude too fast. Cheap convexity if headlines return.
Loan book credit quality improving two quarters running while the multiple still prices recession-level losses.
Earnings beat behind it, buyback authorization ahead. Clean momentum plus capital return.
Capex guide will spook the street again. Great business, but the AI spend reflex short works every quarter.
Every dip since March has been bought within three sessions. The crowd that matters is still accumulating.
Still the cheapest AI-native megacap. Waymo and cloud are free options at this multiple.
The quality compounder for a soft-landing tape. Boring is the alpha this month.
